title: cephalocereus oligolepis
intro: Cephalocereus oligolepis, also known as the columnar cactus, is a species of cactus in the genus Cephalocereus, characterized by its upright, columnar stems and white or pale yellow flowers. Traditionally, Cephalocereus oligolepis has been used in folk medicine, where it is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Cephalocereus oligolepis is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its purported medicinal and health benefits.
